CustomField.formula: IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Parent_Name__c)), OR( ISPICKVAL(Practice_Area__c, "Real Estate Development (Property File)"), ISPICKVAL(Practice_Area__c, "Intellectual Property (Property file)"), ISPICKVAL(Practice_Area__c, "Litigation (Property File)") ) ), File_No__c & "/ " & IF( ISPICKVAL(Department__c, "Secretarial"), Hisa_Job_No__c, Job_No__c ) & "-" & (Unit_Description__c), File_No__c & "/ " & IF( ISPICKVAL(Department__c, "Secretarial"), Hisa_Job_No__c, Job_No__c ) )
CustomField.label: Our Ref
